name: Lithocholic acid calorie-restriction mimetic animal aging study
summary: Metabolomics and functional-validation study testing lithocholic acid as a calorie-restriction-associated metabolite across mouse muscle phenotypes and C. elegans and Drosophila lifespan or healthspan readouts.
model_system: Mouse muscle regeneration, grip strength, and running-capacity experiments plus C. elegans and Drosophila longevity or healthspan models
